title: hymenasplenium laterepens
intro: Hymenasplenium laterepens, also known as the lateral spleenwort, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. It is a perennial plant with a distinctive habit of growing in shaded, moist areas. Traditionally, Hymenasplenium laterepens has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support immune function, and it can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions for use in herbal remedies.
